description: The 'Ndrina Arena is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization based in Isola Capo Rizzuto, Calabria, Italy. It has influence in the Catanzaro area through alliances with local clans. The clan has been involved in drug and arms trafficking, counterfeiting, extortion, and murder, with operations extending to Brazil and Germany. Key figures include Nicola Arena and Carmine Arena.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico di armi e di droga in Brasile e Germania
country_links.context: The organization trafficked weapons and drugs in Brazil.
